description: AI-powered legacy code migration that analyzes codebases, plans migration strategies, and converts code to modern frameworks

agents.name: Code Analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes legacy codebases to detect languages, dependencies, patterns, and risks

agents.name: Migration Planner
agents.description: Creates phased migration plans with effort estimates, risk assessments, and rollback strategies

agents.name: Conversion Agent
agents.description: Converts legacy code to modern frameworks with confidence scoring and manual review flags
